description_long: This rifle features a tan polymer stock and lower receiver, paired with a black metal upper receiver and barrel assembly. The design includes a prominent Picatinny rail along the top for mounting optics or accessories, and a detachable box magazine fitted below the receiver. The rifle is equipped with iron sights, with the front and rear sights both visible, and a flash hider at the muzzle. The grip and fore-end are ergonomically shaped, with the fore-end showing a ribbed texture for improved handling. The overall build suggests a modern tactical rifle suitable for urban environments, with robust construction and modular features.
description: A modern tan and black tactical rifle with a Picatinny rail, detachable box magazine, iron sights, and a flash hider. The design is ergonomic and modular, suitable for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle with flash hider, front sight, and ribbed fore-end.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, tan stock, pistol grip, magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the ejection port, magazine, and overall profile of the rifle.
